title: langchain-ai/agents-from-scratch
friendlyTitle: LangChain teaches agents by building an email assistant
summary: agents-from-scratch is a LangChain and LangGraph educational repository that builds toward an ambient email assistant with Gmail integration, human-in-the-loop review, evaluation, and memory. The project uses notebooks and source code to explain how real agent workflows can be assembled step by step.
friendlySummary: This repo shows how to build an AI email assistant with memory and human review steps.
whyItMatters: Developers can use it to learn practical agent architecture around a familiar workflow: email triage and response. It is also a useful template for adding review checkpoints and memory to assistants that operate quietly in the background.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Builders can follow it to learn how agents can handle real tasks while still asking people to approve important actions.
howItsUseful: Developers can use it to learn practical agent architecture around a familiar workflow: email triage and response. It is also a useful template for adding review checkpoints and memory to assistants that operate quietly in the background.
friendlyHowItsUseful: Builders can follow it to learn how agents can handle real tasks while still asking people to approve important actions.
